draft docs / pre-v0

Install

Packaging is not final before v0. This page holds the future install path and current expectations.

Overview Install pre-v0 Configuration draft Code structure pre-v0 Cost receipts draft Permissions draft Troubleshooting pre-v0
pre-v0 placeholder

Expected product surface

The first supported product surface is a local terminal UI. The current repository builds the CLI locally; packaged v0 release instructions will be published once artifacts are ready.

Target platforms

v0 targets macOS and Linux. The Linux release artifact is planned for `x86_64-unknown-linux-musl` so it can run without a glibc dependency.

Likely install notes

The docs should cover provider key setup, first-run indexing behavior, and how to run SqueezyAgent inside an existing repository once packaging is stable.

Current CLI smoke paths

The CLI supports `--health` for configuration smoke checks and `--prompt` for a one-shot streamed response. Provider and model can be selected with `SQUEEZY_PROVIDER`, `SQUEEZY_MODEL`, or matching flags.

sq SqueezyAgent

A local static engine helps the agent understand code structure before wasting LLM tokens on search.
